englishDefinitions: A person whose gender identity is different from the sex they were assigned at birth, especially a person who has medically transitioned or wants to medically transition; this term is now often considered dated, and many people prefer “transgender.”
Relating to transsexual people or to medical transition.
persianTranslation: فردی که هویت جنسیتی‌اش با جنسیت تعیین‌شده در تولد متفاوت است
examples: Some older medical texts use the word “transsexual,” but many people now prefer “transgender.”
He described himself as a transsexual man in the interview.
The clinic once specialized in transsexual health care and gender-affirming treatment.
